commit.message:
fix(extension): gate native-input debugger bridge behind tab whitelist (#129)

* fix(extension): gate native-input debugger bridge behind tab whitelist

automation.content.ts runs on <all_urls> and blindly relays
window.postMessage({source:'summarize-native-input'}) to the background
worker, which attaches chrome.debugger and dispatches trusted mouse/key
events. Any webpage could postMessage that shape and receive a trusted
click on itself, bypassing user-activation gates (popups, clipboard,
downloads) and flashing the debugger banner at will.

Background now maintains a per-tab whitelist. Only extension pages
(sidepanel) — verified by the absence of sender.tab, which Chrome
attaches to all content-script messages and pages cannot suppress — may
arm a tab. runBrowserJs arms the active tab immediately before
userScripts.execute and disarms in a finally, bounding exposure to a
single user-initiated REPL call. Requests from unarmed tabs are
rejected before any debugger attach occurs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: gate native input behind tab arming (#129) (thanks @omnicoder9)

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Use refreshSession instead of setSession for OAuth callback

setSession calls /auth/v1/user which returns 401. Use refreshSession
with the refresh_token from the URL hash instead - this exchanges
the refresh token for a fresh session without the problematic
user validation call.

commit.message:
fix: address review findings (2 HIGH, 4 MEDIUM, 4 LOW) (#86)

* fix(installer,backend,ci): address review findings (HIGH+MEDIUM+LOW)

HIGH #1: Fix model URL mismatch in release.yml — was downloading Qwen3-8B
instead of Qwen3.5-9B.

HIGH #2: Remove dual workflow trigger (push tags + workflow_dispatch) that
caused duplicate builds. All releases now go through workflow_dispatch only.

MEDIUM #3: Close file handles on error in native_host.py _start_llama_servers
to prevent resource leaks when Popen fails.

MEDIUM #4: Fix fragile version parsing in setup.iss DetectExistingInstall —
search for colon after "version" key, not the first colon in the file.

MEDIUM #5: Remove dead .bin upload step from release.yml (DiskSpanning is
disabled, no .bin files are produced).

LOW #8: Add missing $pythonExist check to early-exit guard in
uninstall-cleanup.ps1 so bundled python/ dir is cleaned up.

LOW #10: Replace hardcoded ComponentsList index with name-based loop in
setup.iss InitializeWizard so component reordering won't break GPU label.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(extension): align fallback model info with backend, fix backendReachable

- Remove embed model (nomic-embed-text) from FALLBACK_MODEL_INFO since
  the backend filters it out — prevents confusing disappearance on connect
- Match fallback model keys and descriptions to backend constants exactly
  (qwen3.5:9b, qwen3:14b with matching descriptions)
- Set backendReachable=true in refreshModels success path so buttons
  re-enable after backend comes online

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: contrarian flip — bet opposite of model's direction

Data shows 5W-133L (3.6% WR) across 138 trades. The BS model
consistently picks the wrong side because crypto at 5-min scale
is mean-reverting, not trending. Flipping the side turns 3.6% WR
into 96.4% WR based on historical data. Scoring/gating logic is
unchanged — it correctly identifies good setups, we just bet the
other direction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
security: harden semgrep scanning — zero tolerance policy

- Fix reflected XSS in auth callback (user input interpolated into HTML)
- Add custom semgrep rules for Hono/JWT/cookie security patterns
- Create .semgrepignore to exclude tests, configs, and build output
- Make security:scan blocking (--error) with WARNING+ERROR severity
- Add p/react, p/javascript rulesets to scan
- Harden pre-commit hook: fail if gitleaks/semgrep not installed
- Add security:scan to deploy chain in CLAUDE.md
- Delete comments-only .semgreprc.yml (config lives in package.json)

Add signal scoring: 2-of-3 gate and composite quality score

Direction determination via 2-of-3 condition gate with regime filtering.
Composite score (0-6): trend, structure (single/multi), momentum, regime
alignment, volume spike. Tradeable threshold at score >= 3. 21 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

redesign: cross-hatch texture + seamless transparent nav

Design philosophy: texture from uniform horizontal lines to
multi-angle cross-hatch (45/135/90 deg) simulating CNC mill marks.
Nav bar becomes part of the metal surface, not a floating element.

- Background texture: 3 layers at 45deg/135deg/90deg for cross-hatch
- Increase spotlight opacity to 0.28
- Nav: lower opacity (0.45), stronger blur (16px), border-bottom
  instead of box-shadow for seamless metal-seam feel
- Mobile dropdown: same treatment (transparent + blur + border)
- Update design philosophy with nav and texture sections

commit.message:
fix: run npm install before starting preview from dashboard

When the dashboard recreates a worktree for preview, node_modules is
missing (git doesn't track it). The start_command then hangs trying to
download packages via npx. Install deps first, matching what the worker
does during normal execution.

commit.message:
phase7: restructure Markdown pipeline to align with v7.docx and apply advisor suggestions

Key changes:
- Title: 上市公司为何分红 → 中国上市公司为何分红 (global replace)
- Abstract: single paragraph → 4-paragraph structure (background/ML/DID/synthesis)
- Section 2.4: expanded from ~800 to ~2500 words with theoretical justification per hypothesis
- Chapter 3: renumbered to 表1-3 + 图1-2 (main), 附表A1-A4 + 附图A1-A6 (appendix)
- Chapter 4: renumbered to 表4-9 + 图3-4; Table 6 now includes control variable coefficients
- Section 4.4.5: rewritten with transmission mechanism narrative
- New appendix.md with moved tables/figures from chapters 3 and 4
- References trimmed from 31 to 23 (removed 8 uncited entries)
- Pipeline rebuild: 论文完整版.md regenerated and audited (0 placeholders)

Stata r(3499) workaround: used Python linearmodels.PanelOLS for panel regressions
(entity+time FE, clustered SE) — results verified identical to prior Stata output.
